drop_one_pair.description: Drop each pair, re-compute equal-weight portfolio Sharpe over OOS 2018-01-02 to 2026-05-12. Baseline equal-weight Sharpe 4.474 (deployed inverse-vol Sharpe 4.487).
drop_one_pair.verdict: No single pair is structurally required; worst drop (USDCHF) loses only -0.47 Sharpe, leaving +4.00. Dropping EURGBP actually lifts Sharpe by +0.13.

drop_three_combinatorial.description: All C(10,3)=120 combinations of 3 dropped pairs, equal-weight Sharpe over remaining 7.
drop_three_combinatorial.verdict: 100% of 120 drop-3 combos keep Sharpe > 3.0; even the worst-case 7-pair subset retains Sharpe 3.28.

oos_start_date.description: Slide OOS start date with frozen HPs (W=9, lam_shrink=0.267, n1=n2=5, lam_risk=0.529, tau=0.685).
oos_start_date.verdict: Sharpe robust to start date; range [4.43, 4.86], std 0.148. No discontinuity at the deployed 2018-01-02 boundary.

refit_cadence_offset.description: Annual refits anchored on Jan-1 (deployed) vs Jul-1 (calendar-offset), same OOS window 2018-01-02 -> 2026-05-12.
refit_cadence_offset.verdict: Calendar boundary not exploitable; Jul-anchored refits give Sharpe 4.456 vs Jan-anchored 4.487 (delta -0.03).

alt_universe.description: Run same pipeline with FROZEN deployed HPs on alternative FX universes; OOS 2018-01-02 -> 2026-05-12.
alt_universe.verdict: Edge generalises to other FX universes at lower magnitude; alt majors-crosses Sharpe 1.62, alt USD-EM Sharpe 2.82. Strategy is not cherry-picked to the deployed G10 set.
